title: Eldritch Expansions
description: This mod expands upon Iron's Spells n Spellbooks Eldritch Spells and adds 15 new spells (so far).
body:
This addon expands the Iron’s Spells ‘n Spellbooks arsenal with seven new eldritch-themed spells designed for utility, mobility, and chaotic combat.

## The Spells

**Abyssal Maw:** Carves out a 3x3 plane wherever you look, shredding stone and ore every half-second. It comes with built-in Fortune III and automatically pulls all drops directly to you, so you can clear veins without moving an inch.

**Catacomb Step:** The ultimate panic button. It instantly scans for the nearest 1x2 underground opening and teleports you inside. Use it to dodge a killing blow or skip the digging and jump straight into the nearest cave. Looking up while casting the spell does the opposite effect and teleports you to the surface.

**Feral Distortion:** A raw, violent surge of adrenaline. This spell triggers a brief window of massive speed and strength, turning you into a high-speed wrecking ball for a few seconds.

**Mutable Visage:** Warp your physical scale in half-step increments. Grow massive to tank hits and deal heavy damage, or shrink down to slip through tight gaps. While giant, falling creates a massive ground slam, crouch mid-air to accelerate the impact.

**Profane Bond:** Force your will upon the world. This enthralls nearby creatures, turning wild mobs into temporary allies. It even works on already-tamed pets, forcibly switching their loyalty to you forever.

**Skyfall:** Harness the heavens. By locking onto the sun or moon, you charge yourself with celestial energy. Mark up to 15 targets by looking at them, then unleash a chain of meteors that strike every target in sequence with explosive scatter damage.

**Unbinding:** A massive "get off me" spell. A wave of soulfire grabs every enemy in the vicinity and launches them into the sky. When they finally hit the ground, they’ll be left reeling with lingering Slowness and Weakness.
